<!-- indicator: fig-dc-achieve-health -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-dc-achieve-health
#| fig-cap: 'Top Rated Barriers to Achieving Better Health in Dutchess County (n = 109)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Top Rated Barriers to Achieving Better Health in Dutchess County (n = 109).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-dc-achieve-health", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
